overall_justification: While the newspaper reports on various perspectives regarding the "fixação do cambio," including arguments for considering the current economic conditions, the overall emphasis and framing lean towards an orthodox perspective. The article highlights concerns about potential negative impacts on national credit and public property if the exchange rate is fixed too low.  It also favorably quotes Viscount Itaborahy, suggesting alignment with his views, and criticizes the "jacobinismo" and "monstruoso projecto" associated with those advocating for a lower exchange rate, linking them to potential damage to national credit and public funds. This framing, combined with the lack of strong counter-arguments from the expansionist side, suggests a cautious, orthodox leaning.

supporting_evidence.quote: O bloeo politico inaugurado pelos Srs. Glyeerio e Pinheiro Machado pretende apoderar-se do futuro presidente da Republica, mas é dc esperar ejue este saiba evilar a ruina do credito nacional, o roubo da propriedade publica, que outros não são os principaes elementos do mcínstruoso projecto.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote, attributed to a French newspaper ('Temps') and presented favorably, reflects a clear Orthodox concern, associating a lower exchange rate with the "ruin of national credit" and "theft of public property."

supporting_evidence.quote: se por muito tempo o cambio se conservar baixo na taxa em que se acha mais ou menos (referia-se, salvo erro, á taxa dé "20), o governo e o parlamento não terão outro remédio senão estabelecer como ley'a.1 aquillo que por uma série de annos è real. E' islo justamente o que foi approvado pelo honrado vis conde de Itaborahy
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This passage suggests an Orthodox interpretation of Viscount Itaborahy's position, framing the acceptance of a lower exchange rate as a last resort rather than a desirable policy.

supporting_evidence.quote: Aos conselheiros da monarchia que pela imprensa investem.contra a fixação do cambio, seja-nos licito oppôr outras de não menor valor favoráveis a esta medida.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This statement, while acknowledging opposing views, asserts the existence of equally strong arguments in favor of fixing the exchange rate (a core Orthodox principle), further suggesting an Orthodox leaning.
